controls.control_objective: To ensure , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes
controls.control_description:
'Promoter' means, the person who together with his relatives [as defined in Section
2 (77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his
ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank /
NOFHC, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form part of the
Promoter Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2 (77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of the bank / nofhc, and includes

controls.control_objective: To ensure any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the
form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

controls.control_objective: To ensure the entity that promotes the bank
controls.control_description: 'Promoting entity' means the entity that promotes the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the entity that promotes the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst
controls.control_description:
Provided that a financial institution, scheduled commercial bank, foreign
institutional investor or mutual fund shall not be deemed to be promoter group
merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of
the promoter is held by such institution unless such investment is strategic in
nature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst

controls.control_objective: To ensure be registered as a public limited company under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
The small finance bank shall be registered as a public limited company under the
Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be registered as a public limited company under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to scheme on voluntary transition of urban co-operative bank into a small finance bank, as detailed in chapter ii of this guidelines
controls.control_description:
(4) Primary (Urban) Co-operative Bank (UCBs), which is desirous of voluntarily
transitioning into small finance bank, may refer to Scheme on voluntary
transition of Urban Co-operative Bank into a Small Finance Bank, as detailed
in Chapter II of this Guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer to scheme on voluntary transition of urban co-operative bank into a small finance bank, as detailed in chapter ii of this guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a more appropriate vehicle for local players or players who are focused on lending to unserved / underserved sections of the society
controls.control_description:
(6) As local focus and the ability to serve smaller customers will be the key criteria
in licensing such banks, this may be a more appropriate vehicle for local players
or players who are focused on lending to unserved / underserved sections of
the society.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a more appropriate vehicle for local players or players who are focused on lending to unserved / underserved sections of the society

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible to promote small finance banks
controls.control_description:
'Fit and Proper' criteria
(1) Promoters / Promoter Groups should be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible
to promote small finance banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'fit and proper' in order to be eligible to promote small finance banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as the promoting entity of the bank
controls.control_description:
Corporate Structure
(1) The promoters / promoter group may choose to set up the small finance bank
either as a standalone entity or under a holding company, which shall act as
the promoting entity of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as the promoting entity of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a non-operative financial holding company (nofhc)
controls.control_description:
(2) However, if there is an intermediate company between the small finance bank
and its promoting entity, it should be a Non-Operative Financial Holding
Company (NOFHC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a non-operative financial holding company (nofhc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be registered as an nbfc-cic with the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
If the promoters desire to set up the small finance bank
under a holding company structure, without an NOFHC, the holding company /
the promoting entity shall be registered as an NBFC-CIC with the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be registered as an nbfc-cic with the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out from the bank
controls.control_description:
(3) The general principle for reorganisation of the activities in the group is that all
activities permitted to a bank under Section 6 (1) (a) to (o) of Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 shall be carried out from the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out from the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that similar activities are not conducted through the bank
controls.control_description:
However, if the
Promoters desire to continue existing specialized activities from a separate
entity proposed to be held under the NOFHC, prior approval from RBI would be
required and it should be ensured that similar activities are not conducted
through the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that similar activities are not conducted through the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure primarily undertake basic banking activities of acceptance of deposits and lending to unserved and underserved sections including small business units
controls.control_description:
A small finance bank, in furtherance of the objectives for which it is set up, shall
primarily undertake basic banking activities of acceptance of deposits and lending
to unserved and underserved sections including small business units, small and
marginal farmers, micro and small industries and unorganised sector entities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to primarily undertake basic banking activities of acceptance of deposits and lending to unserved and underserved sections including small business units

controls.control_objective: To ensure have completed at least two years of operations as authorised dealer category-ii
controls.control_description:
Further, a scheduled SFB, after completion of at least two years of operations as
Authorised Dealer Category-II, will be eligible for Authorised Dealer Category-I
license, subject to compliance with the following eligibility norms:
(1) The bank should have completed at least two years of operations as Authorised
Dealer Category-II.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have completed at least two years of operations as authorised dealer category-ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been included in the second schedule to rbi act 1934
controls.control_description: (2) The bank should have been included in the Second Schedule to RBI Act 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been included in the second schedule to rbi act 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹500 crore
controls.control_description: (3) It should have a minimum net worth of ₹500 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹500 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 15%
controls.control_description: (4) Its CRAR should not be less than 15%.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 15%

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 6%, during previous four quarters
controls.control_description: (5) The net NPAs of the bank should not exceed 6%, during previous four quarters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 6%, during previous four quarters

controls.control_objective: To ensure have made profit in the preceding two years
controls.control_description: (6) It should have made profit in the preceding two years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have made profit in the preceding two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure have defaulted in maintenance of crr/ slr during previous two years
controls.control_description:
(7) It should not have defaulted in maintenance of CRR/ SLR during previous two
years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have defaulted in maintenance of crr/ slr during previous two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure have sound internal control systems
controls.control_description: (8) It should have sound internal control systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have sound internal control systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any major regulatory and supervisory concerns
controls.control_description: (9) It should not have any major regulatory and supervisory concerns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any major regulatory and supervisory concerns

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach foreign exchange department, central office, reserve bank of india through pravaah with its applications along with the <image> supporting do
controls.control_description:
The eligible SFB may approach Foreign Exchange Department, Central Office,
Reserve Bank of India through PRAVAAH with its applications along with the
<image>
supporting documents with regard to their eligibility and requisite documents for
grant of Authorised Dealer Category-I license.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach foreign exchange department, central office, reserve bank of india through pravaah with its applications along with the <image> supporting do

controls.control_objective: To ensure to open at least 25 per cent of its banking outlets in unbanked rural centres (population upto 9,999 as per the latest census) within one year from th
controls.control_description:
Small finance bank will have general permission to open banking outlets from the
date of commencement of business as per Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance
Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025 as amended from time to time
subject to the condition that it is required to open at least 25 per cent of its banking
outlets in unbanked rural centres (population upto 9,999 as per the latest census)
within one year from the date of commencement of operations..
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to open at least 25 per cent of its banking outlets in unbanked rural centres (population upto 9,999 as per the latest census) within one year from th

controls.control_objective: To ensure primarily be responsive to local needs
controls.control_description:
It is expected that the small
finance bank should primarily be responsive to local needs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to primarily be responsive to local needs

controls.control_objective: To ensure liberalize the scope of activities of the small finance banks
controls.control_description:
After the initial
stabilization period of five years, and after a review, RBI may liberalize the scope
of activities of the small finance banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to liberalize the scope of activities of the small finance banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept distinctly ring-fenced and not comingled with the banking business
controls.control_description:
The other financial and non-financial services activities of the promoters, if
any, should be kept distinctly ring-fenced and not comingled with the banking
business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept distinctly ring-fenced and not comingled with the banking business

controls.control_objective: To ensure there is an agreement / contract, etc
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to there is an agreement / contract, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹300 crore
controls.control_description:
The minimum paid-up voting equity share capital/ net worth for small finance banks
shall be ₹300 crore, except for such small finance bank which has:
(1) Transitioned from a UCB: The minimum net worth shall be ₹150 crore from
the date of commencement of business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹300 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a minimum net worth of ₹300 crore or it shall infuse additional paid-up voting equity share capital to achieve net worth of ₹300 crore within eig
controls.control_description:
(2) Converted from NBFC/MFI/LAB/PB: The entity shall have a minimum net
worth of ₹300 crore or it shall infuse additional paid-up voting equity share
capital to achieve net worth of ₹300 crore within eighteen months from the date
of in-principle approval or as on the date of commencement of operations,
whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a minimum net worth of ₹300 crore or it shall infuse additional paid-up voting equity share capital to achieve net worth of ₹300 crore within eig

controls.control_objective: To ensure be readily available at the time of obtaining banking licence
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The minimum paid-up voting equity share capital/ net worth of
₹300 crore should be readily available at the time of obtaining banking licence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be readily available at the time of obtaining banking licence

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 15 per cent of its risk weighted assets (rwa) on a continuous basis
controls.control_description:
The small finance bank shall be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy
ratio of 15 per cent of its risk weighted assets (RWA) on a continuous basis, subject
to any higher percentage as may be prescribed by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 15 per cent of its risk weighted assets (rwa) on a continuous basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least 7
controls.control_description:
Tier I
capital should be at least 7.5 per cent of RWAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to a maximum of 100 per cent of total tier i capital
controls.control_description:
Tier II capital should be limited to
a maximum of 100 per cent of total Tier I capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to a maximum of 100 per cent of total tier i capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by reserve bank of india (small finance banks-prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 with respect to capital adequacy requir
controls.control_description:
The bank shall be guided by
Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks-Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025 with respect to capital adequacy requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by reserve bank of india (small finance banks-prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025 with respect to capital adequacy requir

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank at all times during the first five years from the date of commenc
controls.control_description:
The promoters shall hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity
share capital of the bank at all times during the first five years from the date of
commencement of business of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold a minimum of 40 per cent of the paid-up voting equity share capital of the bank at all times during the first five years from the date of commenc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought down to 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity <image> share capital within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the bank
controls.control_description:
Further, the
promoters' stake should be brought down to 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity
<image>
share capital within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought down to 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity <image> share capital within 15 years from the date of commencement of business of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold a minimum of 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share capital at all times during the first five years from commencement of business of the ban
controls.control_description:
Further, in the case of such small finance bank which has transitioned from UCB,
the promoters shall hold a minimum of 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share
capital at all times during the first five years from commencement of business of
the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold a minimum of 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share capital at all times during the first five years from commencement of business of the ban

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought down to 26 per cent over a period of 15 years from the date of reaching net worth of ₹300 crore by such ucbs
controls.control_description:
The Promoters' holding in excess of 26 per cent may be brought down
to 26 per cent over a period of 15 years from the date of reaching net worth of ₹300
crore by such UCBs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought down to 26 per cent over a period of 15 years from the date of reaching net worth of ₹300 crore by such ucbs

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution
controls.control_description:
If the existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs have diluted the promoters' shareholding to
below 40 per cent, but above 26 per cent, due to regulatory requirements or
otherwise, RBI may not insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on the promoters' minimum initial contribution

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a dilution schedule for bringing down the stake to 26 per cent within 15 years, which will be examined and approved by the rbi
controls.control_description:
At the time of issue of licences, the promoters having shareholding in excess of 40
per cent or 26 per cent of paid-up voting equity share capital, as applicable, shall
submit a dilution schedule for bringing down the stake to 26 per cent within 15
years, which will be examined and approved by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a dilution schedule for bringing down the stake to 26 per cent within 15 years, which will be examined and approved by the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically reported by the banks and will be monitored by rbi
controls.control_description:
The progress in achieving
these agreed milestones must be periodically reported by the banks and will be
monitored by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically reported by the banks and will be monitored by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to rbi
controls.control_description:
Any proposed material change (i.e., any change of 10
per cent or above of shareholding) in the shareholding pattern in the promoter
entity at the time of application and during the period between the application and
grant of license should be reported to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it puts in place a robust risk management framework
controls.control_description:
The newly set up small finance bank should ensure that it puts in place a robust
risk management framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that it puts in place a robust risk management framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allocated to different sub-sectors under psl as per the extant psl prescriptions, the bank can allocate the balance 20 per cent to any one or more
controls.control_description:
While 40
per cent of its ANBC or CEOBE, whichever is higher, should be allocated to
different sub-sectors under PSL as per the extant PSL prescriptions, the bank can
allocate the balance 20 per cent to any one or more sub-sectors under the PSL
where it has competitive advantage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allocated to different sub-sectors under psl as per the extant psl prescriptions, the bank can allocate the balance 20 per cent to any one or more

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
In order to ensure that the bank extends loans primarily to small borrowers, at least
50 per cent of its loan portfolio should constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25
lakh on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute loans and advances of up to ₹ 25 lakh on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borrower wise
controls.control_description:
Further, the criteria of upper limit of ₹ 25 lakh shall
be borrower wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borrower wise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that on conversion into a small finance bank, the nbfc / mfi / pb will cease to exist and all its business which a bank can undertake should
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that on
conversion into a small finance bank, the NBFC / MFI / PB will cease to exist and
all its business which a bank can undertake should fold into the bank and the
activities which a bank cannot statutorily undertake be divested / disposed of.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that on conversion into a small finance bank, the nbfc / mfi / pb will cease to exist and all its business which a bank can undertake should

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the stipulations in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Further, the conversion of branches of the NBFC / MFI / PB into bank branches
shall be as per the stipulations in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks
- Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the stipulations in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be realistic and viable
controls.control_description: The business plan submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be realistic and viable

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal / regulatory measures as may be necessary
controls.control_description:
In
case of deviation from the stated business plan after issue of license, RBI may
consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and
imposing other penal / regulatory measures as may be necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider restricting the bank's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal / regulatory measures as may be necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a majority of independent directors, as defined in companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
The Board of small finance bank should have a majority of independent Directors,
as defined in Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a majority of independent directors, as defined in companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the corporate governance guidelines including 'fit and proper' criteria for directors as issued by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
The small finance bank should comply with the corporate governance guidelines
including 'fit and proper' criteria for Directors as issued by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to comply with the corporate governance guidelines including 'fit and proper' criteria for directors as issued by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be under nofhc structure
controls.control_description:
If a promoter of a payments bank desires to set up a small finance bank, both the
banks should be under NOFHC structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be under nofhc structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
The limits on
shareholding, as prescribed in Annex-I of the Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Acquisition and Holding of Shares or Voting Rights) Directions,
2025 shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider providing time up to three years from the date of the 'in principle' approval for the shareholding to be brought down to a maximum of 10%/15%
controls.control_description:
In case of existing NBFCs/MFIs/LABs converting into small finance bank, where
there is shareholding in excess of 10 per cent and 15 per cent of the paid-up voting
equity capital by entities, other than the promoters (including private equity funds),
RBI may consider providing time up to three years from the date of the 'in principle'
approval for the shareholding to be brought down to a maximum of 10%/15%.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider providing time up to three years from the date of the 'in principle' approval for the shareholding to be brought down to a maximum of 10%/15%

controls.control_objective: To ensure be technology driven from the beginning, conforming to generally accepted standards and norms
controls.control_description:
The operations of the bank should be technology driven from the beginning,
conforming to generally accepted standards and norms;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be technology driven from the beginning, conforming to generally accepted standards and norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be furnished to rbi
controls.control_description:
while new approaches
(such as for data storage, security and real time data updation) are encouraged, a
detailed technology plan for the same should be furnished to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be furnished to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints
controls.control_description:
The bank should have a high powered Customer Grievances Cell to handle
customer complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a high powered customer grievances cell to handle customer complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted in the prescribed form (form iii)
controls.control_description:
In terms of Rule 11 of the Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949,
applications shall be submitted in the prescribed form (Form III).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted in the prescribed form (form iii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the business plan as per paragraph 34 and other requisite information as per the annex i
controls.control_description:
In addition, the
applicants should furnish the business plan as per paragraph 34 and other requisite
information as per the Annex I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the business plan as per paragraph 34 and other requisite information as per the annex i

controls.control_objective: To ensure also furnish a plan and methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines
controls.control_description:
The applicant should also furnish a plan and
methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the
guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also furnish a plan and methodologies they would adopt to comply with all the requirements of the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted through pravaah and should be addressed to: the chief general manager, department of regulation, reserve bank of india, central office, c
controls.control_description:
Applications for setting up of
small finance banks in the private sector, along with other details as mentioned
above, should be submitted through PRAVAAH and should be addressed to:
The Chief General Manager,
Department of Regulation,
Reserve Bank of India,
Central Office,
Central Office Building,
Shahid Bhagat Singh Road,
Mumbai - 400001
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted through pravaah and should be addressed to: the chief general manager, department of regulation, reserve bank of india, central office, c

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit and proper' criteria prescribed at paragraph 8 and 9 a
controls.control_description:
RBI may apply
additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit
and proper' criteria prescribed at paragraph 8 and 9 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in addition to the 'fit and proper' criteria prescribed at paragraph 8 and 9 a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required by it
controls.control_description:
The Committee will reserve the right
to call for more information as well as have discussions with any applicant/s and
seek clarification on any issue as may be required by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the 'in- principle approval'
controls.control_description:
After issue of the 'in-principle approval' for setting up of a small finance bank, if any
adverse features are noticed regarding the Promoters or the companies / entities
with which the Promoters are associated and the group in which they have interest,
the RBI may impose additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the 'in-
principle approval'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the 'in- principle approval'

controls.control_objective: To ensure a co- operative society, other than a primary agricultural credit society, whose: (1) primary object or principal business of which is the transaction
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 5 (ccv) read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 a primary co-operative bank (Urban Co-operative Bank or UCB) means a co-
operative society, other than a primary agricultural credit society, whose:
(1) Primary object or principal business of which is the transaction of banking
business;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a co- operative society, other than a primary agricultural credit society, whose: (1) primary object or principal business of which is the transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the admission of a co-operative bank as a member by reason of such co-operative bank subscribing to the share capital of such co-operative so
controls.control_description:
and
(3) Bye-laws of which do not permit admission of any other co-operative society
as a member: Provided that this sub-clause shall not apply to the admission of
a co-operative bank as a member by reason of such co-operative bank
subscribing to the share capital of such co-operative society out of funds
provided by the State Government for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the admission of a co-operative bank as a member by reason of such co-operative bank subscribing to the share capital of such co-operative so

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to voluntarily transition into a sfb
controls.control_description:
Under the scheme UCBs with a good track record shall be eligible to voluntarily
transition into a SFB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to voluntarily transition into a sfb

controls.control_objective: To ensure identify promoters in the manner as set out subsequently in the scheme for making an application to rbi for transition to sfb under the scheme
controls.control_description:
Eligible UCB shall identify promoters in the manner as set
out subsequently in the scheme for making an application to RBI for transition to
SFB under the scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to identify promoters in the manner as set out subsequently in the scheme for making an application to rbi for transition to sfb under the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate a public limited company under the companies act, 2013 having the word 'bank' in its name after receiving the in- principle approval from
controls.control_description:
The promoters shall incorporate a public limited company under
the Companies Act, 2013 having the word 'bank' in its name after receiving the in-
principle approval from RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate a public limited company under the companies act, 2013 having the word 'bank' in its name after receiving the in- principle approval from

controls.control_objective: To ensure have required experience and shall meet rbi's 'fit and proper' criteria
controls.control_description:
The board of directors of the company shall have
required experience and shall meet RBI's 'fit and proper' criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have required experience and shall meet rbi's 'fit and proper' criteria

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into an agreement with ucb for transfer of assets and liabilities, to be executed at a future date (after issuance of sfb licence)
controls.control_description:
The above company shall enter into an agreement with UCB for transfer of assets
and liabilities, to be executed at a future date (after issuance of SFB licence).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into an agreement with ucb for transfer of assets and liabilities, to be executed at a future date (after issuance of sfb licence)

controls.control_objective: To ensure then approach rbi for issuance of sfb licence, with evidence of funds available for infusion as equity in any acceptable form, so as to ensure that th
controls.control_description:
The
promoters shall then approach RBI for issuance of SFB licence, with evidence of
funds available for infusion as equity in any acceptable form, so as to ensure that
the SFB commences operations with a minimum net worth of ₹150 crore and
minimum promoters' contribution of 26% of the paid-up share capital as well as
voting rights of the bank (subject to paragraph 19 (1) above).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to then approach rbi for issuance of sfb licence, with evidence of funds available for infusion as equity in any acceptable form, so as to ensure that th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as promoters for the incorporation of the new public limited company
controls.control_description:
Promoters
(1)A group of individuals/professionals, having an association with UCB as regular
members for a period of not less than three years and approved by General Body
with 2/3rd majority of members present and voting shall be treated as promoters
for the incorporation of the new public limited company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as promoters for the incorporation of the new public limited company

controls.control_objective: To ensure have ten years of experience in banking and finance
controls.control_description:
(2)The promoters must be residents and shall have ten years of experience in banking
and finance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have ten years of experience in banking and finance

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to the definition of the sebi (issue of capital & disclosure requirements) regulations, 2009 and rbi guidelines on 'fit and proper'
controls.control_description:
Promoter / Promoter Groups shall conform to the definition of the SEBI
(Issue of Capital & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2009 and RBI
guidelines on 'fit and proper'.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to conform to the definition of the sebi (issue of capital & disclosure requirements) regulations, 2009 and rbi guidelines on 'fit and proper'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹150 crore from the date of commencement of business
controls.control_description:
Capital requirement: The minimum net worth of the proposed SFB shall be ₹150
crore from the date of commencement of business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ₹150 crore from the date of commencement of business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured
controls.control_description:
As small finance banks are
required to maintain a minimum capital adequacy ratio of 15 per cent of its risk
weighted assets (RWA) on a continuous basis, availability of adequate capital shall
be ensured.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain at least 26% of the paid-up voting equity share capital
controls.control_description:
Promoters shall maintain at least 26% of the paid-up voting equity
share capital.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain at least 26% of the paid-up voting equity share capital

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'on-tap', and the applications could be submitted to the reserve bank at any point of time, through pravaah
controls.control_description:
The scheme shall be 'on-tap', and the applications could be submitted to the
Reserve Bank at any point of time, through PRAVAAH.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'on-tap', and the applications could be submitted to the reserve bank at any point of time, through pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit application in the prescribed form (form iii) along with the following documents and information: (1) the general body resolution by 2/3rd majo
controls.control_description:
In terms of Rule 11 of the
Banking Regulation (Companies) Rules, 1949, promoters shall submit application
in the prescribed form (Form III) along with the following documents and
information:
(1) The general body resolution by 2/3rd majority of members present and voting to
transition into a Small Finance Bank as per the scheme and authorizing the Board
of Directors for taking all steps for facilitating smooth transition process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit application in the prescribed form (form iii) along with the following documents and information: (1) the general body resolution by 2/3rd majo

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit documents for establishing compliance with the requirements and ensure that the ucb continues to comply with the above parameters till the appl
controls.control_description:
Along with the application, the promoters shall submit documents for establishing
compliance with the requirements and ensure that the UCB continues to comply
with the above parameters till the application is finally disposed of.

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish their business plans and project reports along with their applications
controls.control_description:
The promoters shall furnish their business plans and project reports along with their
applications.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be realistic and viable
controls.control_description:
The business plan
submitted by the applicant should be realistic and viable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be realistic and viable

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider restricting the sfb's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary
controls.control_description:
In case of deviation from
the stated business plan after issue of licence, RBI may consider restricting the
SFB's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal
measures as may be necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider restricting the sfb's expansion, effecting change in management and imposing other penal measures as may be necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to furnish following additional information along with the application: (1) information of individual promoters

The promoters must ensure to furnish following additional information along with
the application:
(1) Information of individual promoters

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address how the bank proposes to achieve financial inclusion and how the existing business of the ucb will fold into the small finance bank or diveste

controls.control_description:
(i) The promoters may furnish any other relevant information and documents
supporting the applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish any other relevant information and documents supporting the applications

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for any other additional information, as may be required, in due course
controls.control_description:
Further, the RBI may call for any other additional
information, as may be required, in due course.

Reserve Bank of India,
Central Office,

(1) UCB's board resolution for transfer of assets and liabilities to the banking
company.

RBI may apply additional criteria to determine the suitability of applications, in

noticed subsequently regarding the promoters or the UCB, RBI may impose
additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the in-principle approval.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose additional conditions and if warranted, may withdraw the in-principle approval

controls.control_description:
Explanation (1): Business plan should, inter alia, include (but not limited to), the
underlying assumptions, the existing infrastructure/ network/ branches, and the
proposed product lines, target clientele, target locations, usage of technology, risk
management, plans relating to human resources, branch network, alternative
points of presence, opening of branches in unbanked rural areas, priority sector
compliance, financial projections for five years, etc.
